name: Minted Barley Beans
recipeIngredient: 2 cups fresh cooked or canned white kidney beans
2 tbsp fresh mint chopped or 1 tbsp dry mint
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium saucepan, bring the 3.5 cups of vegetable broth or stock to a boil.
2. Slowly add the 1.5 cups of pearled barley. Reduce heat to low and cover.
3. Simmer for 35 to 45 minutes, or until all of the broth or stock has been absorbed and the barley is tender.
4. Rinse the kidney beans in a colander or sieve and allow them to drain.
5. Chop the mint.
6. Add the beans to the cooked pearled barley and cook on low heat until heated, approximately 5 minutes. Remove from the heat.
7. Add the mint and mix well. Garnish with a few mint sprigs.
8. Serve hot. Makes 4 side dish servings. Reheats well in a microwave.
